name: Low Cal Cocoa Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ingredients well and store in an airtight container in a moderately cool place.
2. Use 2 tablespoons of mix plus 6 ounces boiling water per serving of cocoa.
3. Variations:
- Mexican Cocoa: Add 2-3 teaspoons cinnamon when mixing the total ingredients.
- Mocha: Add 1/3 cup instant coffee (or 1/2 teaspoon in a cup of cocoa).
